title: paraserianthes lophantha var. kostermansii
intro: Paraserianthes lophantha var. kostermansii, commonly known as a plant species native to Southeast Asia, is a member of the Fabaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antidiabetic activities. The therapeutic actions attributed to Paraserianthes lophantha var. kostermansii include antioxidant, analgesic, and anti-ulcer properties. Its bioactive constituents have been identified as flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal effects.
